item.title: On the retirement of Karpe
item.description:
I find it very sad. Some people say the duo have made the background music of their lives. I would disagree; they have indeed made my lives foreground music. Withour further ado, let's dvelve into the best songs of the three albums released yesterday: - Pasta (feat. ???): The question marks is where it really gets interesting. Great collaborations, super punchy and aggressive yet humorous tone. - forever alltid in love: Cezinando feature + insane Magdi verse, what more to ask for. - Soccer Mom 1+2: Very fun pop song. - 01: A well deserved 30 minutes of silence for quarter a century of being the centre of norwegian rap and pop music.
Thank you guys for reading, have a good one!

item.title: The death of the fun project
item.description: What are we supposed to live off of after the oil? Making AI B2B SaaSses on our spare time?

item.title: I am scared for my Laif!
item.description: Experimenting with a OpenClaw-based agentic system to properly coach me in sports and in general l(a)if (haha) sh leif.

item.title: Hi Claude, please make it say "Hello, world"
item.description: First post on wwwik.no. Will probably forget to write any more.
